subject: JUST LISTED || Alpine Hills Apartments | 100% occupied community with significant rental upside in supply constrained market | Cadillac, MI
text:

		<title>Preview Email</title>
	</head>
	<body>
		<span style="margin: 0; padding: 0; font-size: 1px; mso-line-height-rule: exactly; line-height: 1px;color: #ffffff;">
                        
                    </span>
		<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="border-collapse:collapse; height:100%; width:100%;">
			<tr>
				<td class="wrapper" align="center" valign="top" style="background-color:#ffffff;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;padding-top:10px; text-align:left;">
					<table class="force-row" align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="border-collapse:collapse; margin:0 auto;">
						<tr>
							<td class="email_border" align="top" style="border-collapse:collapse;border-top:1px solid #435254;border-right:1px solid #435254;border-bottom:1px solid #435254;border-left:1px solid #435254;">
								<table class="email_wrapper force-row" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="height:auto; width:800px;">
									<tr>
										<td class="email_body" valign="top" style="background-color:#ffffff;">
											<table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" width="100%">
												<tr xmlns="">
													<td class="section_trouble_viewing" valign="top" style="background-color:#ffffff;padding-bottom:10px;padding-left:10px;padding-right:10px;padding-top:10px;">

															<tr>
																<td class="content" valign="top" style="background-color:transparent;padding-bottom:10px;padding-left:10px;padding-right:10px;padding-top:10px;">
																	<table class="force-row" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:100%;">
																		<tr>
																			<td class="trouble_viewing_copy" valign="top" style="font-family:Tahoma, sans-serif;color:#435254;font-size:10px;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;">
																				<div style="text-align:center;">
                                            Having trouble viewing this email? <a href="https://www.cbredealflow.com/handler/email.aspx?pv=IFUCz4bFW38Aj2oPtI1O5Dv5SlbjQBpQR2h74tFifFMKtTkkxcbzToJL6U3tIla2AsSSw2x67X1OravBHD8pCbyD4_MfQqN6mlInHwZtFcSBIeJsmxB78IgQ0f3rIfZc" target="_blank" style="color:#075691">View online instead</a>.
                                        </div>
																			</td>
																		</tr>
																	</table>
																</td>
															</tr>
														</table>
													</td>
												</tr>
												<tr xmlns="">
													<td class="section_main_header" valign="top" style="background-color:#075691;padding-bottom:20px;padding-left:28px;padding-right:28px;padding-top:20px;">
														<!--[if mso]>
                    <table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:100%;">
                    <tr>
                    <td valign="top" style="width:128px;">
                <![endif]-->

															<tr>

																	<table class="force-row" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:100%;">
																		<tr>
																			<td class="image" align="left" valign="top" style="padding-bottom:0px; padding-left:0px; padding-right:0px; padding-top:20px;">
																				<img src="https://my.rcm1.com/files/wiCt6TCo4scfzY2z2k2mKbY-TDoj6s2oDIU4RTouMglCTe2cmDAY3jFid7cuksEv3eg8LsrBHkPSFloFxrS7DBICFZy-ViXr4kpGdiz87Ao.png" border="0" hspace="0" vspace="0" alt="cbre-logo.png" width="100" height="24" style="max-width:100px;width:100px;" />
																			</td>
																		</tr>
																	</table>

															</tr>
														</table>
														<!--[if mso]>
                    </td>
                    <td valign="top" style="width:672px;">
                    <![endif]-->
														<table class="force-row" align="right" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="display:inline-table;float:right;width:644px;">
															<tr>

																	<table class="force-row" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:100%;">
																		<tr>
																			<td class="main_heading" valign="top" style="background-color:transparent;font-family:Times, serif;color:#ffffff;font-size:36px;font-style:normal;font-weight:bold;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:20px;padding-right:0px;padding-top:15px;text-align:right">Alpine Hills Apartments</td>
																		</tr>
																		<tr>
																			<td class="main_subheading" valign="top" style="background-color:transparent;font-family:Tahoma, sans-serif;color:#ffffff;font-size:16px;font-style:normal;font-weight:normal;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:20px;padding-right:0px;padding-top:0px;text-align:right">328 Pearl Street, Cadillac, MI</td>
																		</tr>
																		<tr>
																			<td valign="top" style="line-height:20px; height:20px;"> </td>
																		</tr>

                <![endif]-->
													</td>
												</tr>
												<tr xmlns="">
													<td class="section_single_image" valign="top" style="background-color:#ffffff;padding-bottom:0px;padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;padding-top:0px;">
														<table class="force-row" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:100%;">
															<tr>
																<td class="responsive-image image" align="center" valign="top">
																	<img src="https://my.rcm1.com/files/j0Q9BYC6THGPfEyLc_XHB5mqgnVGsnyygMn8J3v2heCC6x3wWH24qGhK6CrBGNxymOybHQvxnR4IyFd5YW_euuK0X3wdxe_fIEwDacGXugwO9klgNVwfO_u7eB8d_kbH8Mhho562QGvepZ3F50dlfQ.JPG" border="0" hspace="0" vspace="0" alt="" width="800" height="599" style="max-width:1000px;width:800px;" />
																</td>
															</tr>
														</table>
													</td>
												</tr>
												<tr xmlns="">
													<td class="section_single_column" valign="top" style="background-color:#ffffff;padding-bottom:5px;padding-left:30px;padding-right:30px;padding-top:5px;">
														<table class="force-row" align="left" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:100%;">
															<tr>
																<td class="content" valign="top" style="background-color:transparent;padding-bottom:10px;padding-left:0px;padding-right:0px;padding-top:10px;">
																	<table class="force-row" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:100%;">
																		<tr>
																			<td class="section_heading" valign="top" style="
                                                background-color:#ffffff;
                                                font-family:Times New, serif;
                                                color:#075691;
                                                font-size:19px;
                                                font-style:normal;
                                                font-weight:bold;
                                                padding-bottom:0px;
                                                padding-left:0px;
                                                padding-right:0px;
                                                padding-top:0px;
                                                text-align:left;
                                            ">The Offering</td>
																		</tr>
																		<tr>
																			<td valign="top" style="
                        line-height:10px;
                        height:10px;
                    "> 
                </td>
																		</tr>
																		<tr>
																			<td class="copy" valign="top" style="font-family:Tahoma, sans-serif;color:#435254;font-size:13px;"><div>​​​​​​​CBRE Michigan Multifamily, as exclusive advisor, is pleased to present Alpine Hills Apartments. This 36-unit apartment community in Cadillac, Michigan presents an exceptional investment opportunity, highlighted by its strong operational performance and a robust local market. The property boasts 100% occupancy with no bad debt or concessions, demonstrating immediate cash flow stability for a new owner. Rents are currently below market. CBRE expects that the current in-place rents of $798 can be raised by roughly $100/unit, which represents $43,200 in additional rental revenue that can be achieved. The Cadillac apartment market is characterized by extremely low vacancy rates, with multifamily apartments surveyed operating at a 99% occupancy rate and rents of $897 on average, indicating a supply shortage and promising reliable rent growth well into the future. The current owner has also diligently maintained the asset, investing nearly $150,000 in property improvements, including new roofs, since their acquisition in 2022, ensuring its long-term physical integrity. Ownership also plans to mill and overlay the entrance to the property and reseal the remaining parking lot in the next 30-60 days.<br>​​​​​​​<br>Further enhancing its appeal, the property benefits from professional management by KMG Prestige, a reputable firm recognized as one of the largest residential property managers in Michigan, which can seamlessly continue operations for the next owner. This offering is competitively priced at $50,000 per unit, which is a 7.91% cap rate, making it an incredibly attractive purchase given its strong fundamentals and high-quality tenant base.</div></td>
																		</tr>
																	</table>
																</td>
															</tr>
														</table>
													</td>
												</tr>
												<tr xmlns="">
													<td class="section_buttons" valign="top" style="background-color:#ffffff;padding-bottom:20px;padding-left:30px;padding-right:30px;padding-top:20px;
                ">
														<!--[if mso]>
                    <table cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" border="0" style="width:100%;">
                    <tr>
                    <td valign="top" style="width:50%;">

																			<td class="section_heading" valign="top" style="

                                            ">Investment Highlights</td>

																		<tr>
																			<td valign="top" style="

                                                "> 
                                            </td>

																		<tr>
																			<td class="copy" valign="top" style="
                                            color:#435254;
                                            font-family:Tahoma, sans-serif;
                                            font-size:13px;
                                        "><div><ul><li><strong>100% Occupancy and Strong Performance: </strong>The property is fully occupied with no bad debt or concessions, ensuring immediate and stable cash flow.</li><li><strong>Below Market Rents and Robust Market Fundamentals:</strong> In-place rents of $798 can be increased by $100/unit to be in line with average of rent comps at $897. The Cadillac apartment market experiences virtually no vacancy (99% occupancy in surveyed multifamily apartments), indicating strong demand and a high likelihood of reliable rent growth.</li><li><strong>Well-Maintained Asset:</strong> Current ownership has invested almost $150,000 in property improvements, including new roofs, since purchasing the property in 2022, demonstrating excellent upkeep. Ownership also plans to mill and overlay the entrance to the property and reseal the remaining parking lot in the next 30-60 days. </li><li><strong>Professional Management in Place:</strong> The property is professionally managed by KMG Prestige, one of the largest residential property managers in Michigan, offering experienced and reputable operational continuity for a new owner.</li><li><strong>Attractive Valuation:</strong> Offered at a compelling purchase price of $50,000 per unit and a 7.91% cap rate, this opportunity combines strong fundamentals and a quality tenant base with an excellent return on investment.</li></ul></div><div><strong><a data-cke-saved-href="https://www.cbre.com" href="https://www.cbre.com" style="color: #075691" target="_blank">Please click here for more info</a></strong></div></td>
																		</tr>
